title: CRISPR Therapeutics Q4 2024 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: CRISPR Therapeutics Q4 2024 Earnings Summary. EPS Performance: CRISPR reported a loss of 44 cents per share, significantly beating expectations of a $1.15 loss. This contrasts with the prior year's earnings of $1.10 per share. Revenue: Total revenues reached $35.7 million, substantially exceeding the consensus estimate of $10 million. Year-over-year, revenues declined from $201.2 million, primarily because last year's results included substantial collaboration payments from Vertex Pharmaceuticals related to Casgevy approvals. Operating Expenses: R&D expenses decreased 14% to $82.2 million due to reduced external research costs. General and administrative expenses rose 10% to $18.1 million. Cash Position: As of December 31, 2024, the company held $1.90 billion in cash and marketable securities. Full-Year 2024 Results: Annual revenues totaled $37.3 million (down from $371.2 million in 2023), while the net loss per share widened to $4.34 from $1.94 previously. Pipeline Progress: The company is advancing CRISPR-based CAR-T therapies, with CTX112 and CTX131 in phase I/II studies. Management expects regulatory alignment discussions and study updates throughout 2025. Stock Performance: CRSP shares declined 20.4% over three months versus the sector's 7.9% decline.
